name: User Account Management
description: Detects user account creation, deletion, modification, group membership changes, lockouts, and password operations. Critical for detecting persistence via rogue accounts and privilege escalation through group manipulation.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4724: Attempt to reset account password (by admin)
event_descriptions.4728: Member added to global security group
event_descriptions.4729: Member removed from global security group
event_descriptions.4732: Member added to local security group
event_descriptions.4733: Member removed from local security group
event_descriptions.4756: Member added to universal security group
